data.name: Love Revenge
data.detailed_description:
The demons have kidnapped and spread fear and destruction everywhere, but Cupid has the toughest and most naughty rescue mission.

-10 Levels of lewd shooting action!
-9 Weapons to line your inventory including your cock
-Harem Mode (Take the girls on in a very special way)
-Fully animated sex scenes with every enemy!
-Meet many NPC's and upgrade your gear!
-Unlock secret hot scenes...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit). or Linux (Steam OS)
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit). or Linux (Steam OS)
  • 處理器: Any Dual-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
